title: Lombok 5-Day Beach Getaway
metaTitle: Lombok 5-Day Beach Getaway | Flights, Hotels & Tours Included
metaDescription: Book a 5-day trip to Lombok, Indonesia: round-trip flights, hotel, breakfast, transfers, and guided tours including Mount Rinjani trek and Gili Islands snorkeling day trip. Prices from $1893 per person (estimate).
highlights: Private sunset dinner overlooking Kuta Lombok's bay
overview: Spend 5 days discovering Lombok, Indonesia — Tropical climate — warm year-round (highs around 30-31°C), drier and slightly less humid than Bali, with a wetter season November to March. May to September — the dry season, best for beach days and the Mount Rinjani trek. This itinerary blends Mount Rinjani trek, Gili Islands snorkeling day trip, Kuta Lombok beach with free time to explore at your own pace, backed by round-trip flights, handpicked accommodation, and a dedicated travel consultant from enquiry through departure.
included: Round-trip economy-class airfare from your selected origin city (upgrade to premium economy or business available)
4 nights accommodation in your selected category (Budget, Mid-range, Premium, or Luxury)
Daily local transport as per the itinerary
Guided tours including Mount Rinjani trek, Gili Islands snorkeling day trip, Kuta Lombok beach
All entrance fees for attractions and activities listed in the itinerary
Applicable taxes and OTA service fee
Dedicated travel consultant support from booking through departure
notIncluded: Visa fees and travel document costs (see Visa Information)
Travel insurance (strongly recommended, available as an add-on)
Lunches and dinners except where noted in the itinerary
Optional activities not listed in the day-by-day itinerary
Airline seat selection and baggage upgrades
Any fare difference for premium economy or business class upgrades

itinerary.title: Arrive in Lombok
itinerary.description: Land at Lombok International Airport (LOP) and take your included private transfer to your hotel. After settling in, ease into the trip with a relaxed visit to Mount Rinjani trek — Multi-day climb to Indonesia's second-highest volcano, with a crater lake. Round off the evening with a welcome dinner introducing you to local flavors.

itinerary.title: Lombok: Gili Islands snorkeling day trip & Pink Beach boat tour
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Gili Islands snorkeling day trip — Boat trip to the three Gili Islands for reef snorkeling with sea turtles. In the afternoon, continue to Pink Beach boat tour — Boat excursion to a coral-pink-sand beach on Lombok's southeast coast. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.

itinerary.title: Lombok: Kuta Lombok beach & Sasak traditional village visit (Sade)
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Kuta Lombok beach — Laid-back surf beach on the south coast. In the afternoon, continue to Sasak traditional village visit (Sade) — Small entry donation to view traditional Sasak thatched houses. Evening free to explore local restaurants and nightlife.

itinerary.title: Day Trip to Gili Islands (Trawangan, Air, Meno)
itinerary.description: Full-day excursion to Gili Islands (Trawangan, Air, Meno), a popular side trip from Lombok. Return to Lombok in the evening with time free to explore on your own.
activities: Guided day trip: Gili Islands (Trawangan, Air, Meno)

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.description: Enjoy a final morning at leisure — perhaps one last visit to Senggigi Beach sunset or some souvenir shopping — before your private transfer to LOP for your departure flight.

travelTips: Book the Mount Rinjani trek through a licensed operator with proper permits and equipment — it's a serious multi-day climb.
Hire a driver for the day to combine Pink Beach, Kuta, and southern viewpoints efficiently.
Lombok is noticeably quieter and less developed than neighboring Bali — pack accordingly for fewer amenities outside resorts.
Visit Sade village respectfully and consider a local guide to support the community directly.
Pace yourself — this itinerary includes free time so you are not rushing between every attraction.
packingList: Copies of booking confirmations and travel insurance
Lightweight, breathable clothing and a reusable water bottle
Sturdy shoes for Mount Rinjani trekking
thingsToDo: Surfing at Kuta and Selong Belanak
thingsToAvoid: Attempting Mount Rinjani without a licensed guide and proper gear.
Renting a scooter without international driving experience — roads and traffic norms differ from home.
Wearing swimwear in villages away from the beach.
nightlife: Gili Trawangan party scene (day trip or overnight)
instagramSpots: Kuta Lombok surf breaks at sunset
adventureActivities: Surfing at Kuta and Selong Belanak
luxuryExperiences: Clifftop villa stay above Kuta Lombok
Private boat charter to Pink Beach and the Gilis
honeymoonExperiences: Private sunset dinner overlooking Kuta Lombok's bay
Boat day trip to a secluded Gili island beach
Clifftop villa with an infinity pool
budgetExperiences: Sasak village visit for a small donation
Public boat to the Gili Islands instead of a private charter

festivalCalendar.name: Bau Nyale Festival (sea worm harvest ceremony)

localEtiquette: Lombok is predominantly Muslim (Sasak culture) — dress modestly away from resort beaches.
The Gili Islands off Lombok are car- and motorbike-free — horse carts (cidomo) and bicycles are the norm.
Ask permission before photographing local people or ceremonies.
localTransportGuide: Renting a scooter or hiring a driver is the most practical way to cover Lombok's spread-out beaches and villages — public transport is minimal. The Gili Islands, reached by a short boat ride, are entirely car- and motorbike-free, relying on bicycles and horse carts (cidomo).
bestTimeToVisit: May to September — the dry season, best for beach days and the Mount Rinjani trek.
weather: Tropical climate — warm year-round (highs around 30-31°C), drier and slightly less humid than Bali, with a wetter season November to March.
visaInformation: Indonesia offers visa-on-arrival for most nationalities including the US, UK, EU, Canada, Australia, and India, valid for 30 days and extendable once.
averageFlightTime: ~12.2h from major hubs (estimate; varies by origin — see Suggested Flights)
cancellationPolicy: Cancellations made 30+ days before departure: full refund minus a $99 processing fee. 15-29 days before departure: 50% refund. 0-14 days before departure or no-show: non-refundable. Airline and hotel supplier cancellation terms may be stricter than this policy and apply in addition — your travel consultant confirms exact terms before payment is taken. No online payment is collected on this site; a consultant confirms final pricing and availability with you directly before any booking is confirmed.
termsAndConditions: Pricing shown is per person based on the traveler type and tier selected and is an estimate pending live fare and rate confirmation.
Passports must be valid for at least 6 months beyond the return date for most destinations — confirm the exact requirement for your nationality.
Itinerary order may change due to weather, local conditions, or attraction closures; inclusions remain equivalent.
Solo travelers incur a single-room supplement, reflected in the Solo pricing tier.
This package does not include international travel insurance unless explicitly listed under Included.
Prices shown in a currency other than USD are approximate conversions at the rate noted and are not a payment quote.

faqs.question: Do I need a visa to visit Lombok?
faqs.answer: Indonesia offers visa-on-arrival for most nationalities including the US, UK, EU, Canada, Australia, and India, valid for 30 days and extendable once.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit Lombok?
faqs.answer: May to September — the dry season, best for beach days and the Mount Rinjani trek. Tropical climate — warm year-round (highs around 30-31°C), drier and slightly less humid than Bali, with a wetter season November to March.

faqs.question: What's included in this package?
faqs.answer: Round-trip airfare, accommodation, daily breakfast, airport transfers, daily local transport, and guided tours to the attractions listed in the itinerary. See the Included / Not Included sections for full detail.

faqs.question: Can the itinerary be customized?
faqs.answer: Yes — this itinerary is a starting point. Your travel consultant can add, remove, or reorder activities, extend your stay, or upgrade your hotel category before you book.

faqs.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: Cancellations made 30+ days before departure: full refund minus a $99 processing fee. 15-29 days before departure: 50% refund. 0-14 days before departure or no-show: non-refundable. Airline and hotel supplier cancellation terms may be stricter than this policy and apply in addition — your travel consultant confirms exact terms before payment is taken. No online payment is collected on this site; a consultant confirms final pricing and availability with you directly before any booking is confirmed.

faqs.question: Is Lombok safe for tourists?
faqs.answer: Lombok is generally safe for tourists who take standard precautions — avoid poorly lit areas at night, keep valuables secure, and use licensed transport.

faqs.question: What currency should I bring to Lombok?
faqs.answer: The local currency is IDR. Carry some cash for smaller vendors — card acceptance can be inconsistent outside major hotels and malls.

faqs.question: Is this package good for a honeymoon or family trip?
faqs.answer: Yes — Lombok is one of our most-booked honeymoon destinations, especially the Private sunset dinner overlooking Kuta Lombok's bay experience.

reviews.author: Lucas Müller
reviews.title: Great for families with kids
reviews.body: Everything was handled for us — flights, hotel, transfers, and tours to Kuta Lombok beach and Gili Islands snorkeling day trip. Great communication from the consultant before departure too.

reviews.author: Arjun Patel
reviews.title: Amazing itinerary, zero stress
reviews.body: Booked this as a couple trip and it was well paced. Senggigi Beach sunset in particular stood out. A couple of the transfers ran a little late but nothing that spoiled the trip.

reviews.author: Mohammed van Dijk
reviews.title: Perfect for our honeymoon
reviews.body: Gili Islands snorkeling day trip alone was worth the trip, but combined with Gili Islands snorkeling day trip this itinerary really delivered. Breakfast at the hotel was good every day and the local guide was knowledgeable.

reviews.author: Anna Dubois
reviews.title: Loved every moment
reviews.body: Lombok is stunning and this package covered the essentials well, especially Pink Beach boat tour. The hotel could have been a little closer to the center but transport was easy.

reviews.author: Emma Costa
reviews.title: Beautiful destination, well organized
reviews.body: Our trip to Lombok was fantastic from start to finish. The hotel was clean and well located, and the guided visit to Kuta Lombok beach was a real highlight. Airport transfers were on time both ways.
